description: State document, fragment, in Arabic script. Six lines are preserved, wide space between the lines. Might be a draft, since there are words crossed out in l. 4. The portion preserved consists of expressions of loyalty and praise. Rhymed in places. On verso there is Hebrew literary text.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
